the_thoughts_feel_unbearable_but_having_: The thoughts feel unbearable. But having them does not make you a bad person.
pure_o_ocd_is_a_form_of_ocd_where_the_ob: Pure O OCD is a form of OCD where the obsessions happen entirely in the mind. Unlike other types, there are no visible rituals — no washing, no checking. Instead the compulsions are mental — replaying thoughts, seeking reassurance, or trying to neutralise a thought. It is exhausting in a way that is hard to explain.
noticing_these_patterns_is_the_first_ste: Noticing these patterns is the first step toward freedom. You're building a stronger, more resilient self.
sudden_shocking_thoughts_about_harming_y: Sudden, shocking thoughts about harming yourself or someone you love
obsessive_doubt_about_your_sexuality_or_: Obsessive doubt about your sexuality or identity
intense_guilt_about_whether_you_are_a_go: Intense guilt about whether you are a good or moral person
endless_questioning_about_the_meaning_of: Endless questioning about the meaning of life or reality
fear_that_you_may_have_done_something_te: Fear that you may have done something terrible in the past
constant_doubt_about_whether_you_truly_l: Constant doubt about whether you truly love your partner
